title: platyelasma densum
side_effects: Platyelasma densum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity. Prolonged consumption may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, making it difficult to perform daily activities. In severe cases, improper use can cause liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory problems, requiring immediate medical attention. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using platyelasma densum for medicinal purposes to avoid these adverse effects.
